seed: The list command should support --json output so shell scripts can consume it.
acceptance: plain text list output should keep working
tests cover the new output mode

seed: Users can add blank or whitespace-only task titles right now; reject those cleanly.
acceptance: empty titles are rejected with a clear message
existing add flow still works for valid titles

seed: We need a small stats command that reports total, open, and done task counts.
acceptance: output is easy to read from the CLI

seed: Add a way to filter list output by status because done items are getting noisy.
acceptance: list supports filtering open vs done tasks

seed: The done command is too strict; allow id prefixes or a friendlier lookup flow.
acceptance: done is easier to use without breaking exact ids
tests cover success and failure cases

seed: Refresh the README examples so they reflect the current commands and one realistic workflow.
acceptance: README has a short start-to-finish example

seed: Large task lists are noisy; support a --limit flag on list.
acceptance: tests cover small and large values

seed: When people review the board they want open tasks first and done tasks later.
acceptance: list output sorts open before done
ordering stays stable enough to follow

seed: We need a lightweight rename command so people can fix task titles without editing the JSON file by hand.
acceptance: rename command updates a task title by id

seed: If CLI output changes, make sure the docs include one example for automation scripts.
acceptance: example is consistent with real output
